headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Molina Healthcare, Lowers Price Target to $128
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erin Wright    maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $158 to $128.
